name: American Express
description_short: American Express is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 2.3/5 with 239 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
American Express is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 239 Google reviews and a 2.3/5.0 rating, American Express has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a corporate campus, corporate office, American Express provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. American Express operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering American Express should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
